import re, unicodedata, math

AR_DIACRITICS_PATTERN = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06DC\u06DF-\u06E8\u06EA-\u06ED]")
TATWEEL = "\u0640"
PUNCTUATION_PATTERN = re.compile(r"[\u0600-\u0605\u06DD\u06DE\u06E9\u066A-\u066D\u06FD\u06FE\u061F\u060C\u061B!\"#$%&'()*+,\-./:;<=>?@\[\]^_`{|}~،؟؛٫٬«»…]+")
SPACE_PATTERN = re.compile(r"\s+")

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, "")
    s = AR_DIACRITICS_PATTERN.sub("", s)
    # unify arabic letters forms (hamza variants)
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا").replace("ى","ي").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ٰ","ا")
    s = PUNCTUATION_PATTERN.sub(" ", s)
    s = SPACE_PATTERN.sub(" ", s).strip().lower()
    return s

def lcs_length(a,b):
    # compute LCS length (not DP heavy? We'll do SequenceMatcher as proxy)
    s = difflib.SequenceMatcher(a=a, b=b)
    return sum(tr.size for tr in s.get_matching_blocks())  # includes terminal zero length match block

def best_candidate(text, data, text_field):
    best = None
    best_ratio = 0.0
    an = normalize_arabic(text)
    for item in data:
        s = item.get(text_field,"") or ""
        bn = normalize_arabic(s)
        if not bn:
            continue
        r = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, an, bn).ratio()
        if r > best_ratio:
            best_ratio = r
            best = item
    return best_ratio, best

def token_f1(a, b):
    # approximate F1 at token-level ignoring order
    ta = normalize_arabic(a).split()
    tb = normalize_arabic(b).split()
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    # compute counts
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    # intersection count
    inter = sum(min(ca[t], cb[t]) for t in set(ca.keys()) | set(cb.keys()))
    prec = inter / sum(cb.values())  # tokens in candidate matched
    rec = inter / sum(ca.values())   # tokens in text matched
    if prec + rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec), prec, rec

def best_candidate_by_f1(text, data, field="Matn"):
    best = None
    best_f1 = 0.0
    best_trip = (0,0,0)
    for item in data:
        s = item.get(field,"") or ""
        f1, p, r = token_f1(text, s)
        if f1 > best_f1:
            best_f1 = f1
            best_trip = (f1, p, r)
            best = item
    return best_trip, best

# fix token_f1 to return triple
def token_f1_trip(a, b):
    ta = normalize_arabic(a).split()
    tb = normalize_arabic(b).split()
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0, 0.0, 0.0
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    inter = sum(min(ca[t], cb[t]) for t in set(ca.keys()))
    prec = inter / sum(cb.values())
    rec = inter / sum(ca.values())
    if prec + rec == 0:
        return 0.0, prec, rec
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec), prec, rec

def best_candidate_by_f1(text, data, field="Matn"):
    best = None
    best_f1 = 0.0
    best_trip = (0.0,0.0,0.0)
    for item in data:
        s = item.get(field,"") or ""
        f1, p, r = token_f1_trip(text, s)
        if f1 > best_f1:
            best_f1 = f1
            best_trip = (f1, p, r)
            best = item
    return best_trip, best

best_f1_trip, best_f1_h = best_candidate_by_f1(original_span, hadith_data, "Matn")
best_f1_trip, (best_f1_h.get("Matn") or "")[:400]

def best_quran_by_f1(text):
    best=None
    best_trip=(0,0,0)
    for a in quran_data:
        s = a["ayah_text"]
        trip = token_f1_trip(text, s)
        if trip[0] > best_trip[0]:
            best_trip = trip
            best = a
    return best_trip, best
